title: Marriage Penalties and Bonuses in the Federal Tax Code
summary: When a couple marries, their federal income tax payments are likely to be impacted. Marriage may cause a couple’s tax payments to increase, resulting in a marriage tax penalty, or decrease, resulting in a marriage tax bonus. Marriage penalties and bonuses emerge because of the impossibility of balancing three competing goals in the income tax code: progressivity (higher-income taxpayers pay higher marginal tax...

title: Democracy and Human Rights Promotion in the Trump Administration’s Foreign Policy: In Brief

Since the 1970s in particular, Congress has prescribed an array of statutory provisions and associated policy tools to address matters...
